title: Daddy's Shed Personalised MDF Wood Street Sign Plaque - Custom Gift for Dads, DIY Enthusiasts, Shed, Garage, Workshop Decor (MDF Wood - Indoor use only, Medium 390mm x 85mm)
features: 🏠 Multiple Size Options Available – Choose the ideal fit for your space: Small - 29cm x 6.3cm (290mm x 63mm/11.4" x 2.48"), Medium - 39cm x 8.5cm (390mm x 85mm/15.35" x 3.35"), Large - 44cm x 9cm (440mm x 90mm /17.32" x 3.54"), or Extra Large - 59cm x 13cm (590mm x 130mm/23.23" x 5.12").

✨ Premium Quality Materials – Crafted from durable MDF Wood (indoor use, printed front, blank wooden back) or premium Acrylic (back-printed design visible from the front with a white backing for a stunning visual finish). Acrylic is suitable for both indoor and outdoor display.

🎨 High-Quality Handmade Finish – Each STREET SIGN plaque is lovingly handmade, featuring precision printing. MDF options provide an elegant indoor aesthetic, while the acrylic version has a vivid back-printed design for a shiny, stylish finish suitable indoors or outdoors.

🔨 Easy Display & Versatile Mounting – These plaques DO NOT come with fixings, allowing flexible mounting using command strips, adhesive pads, or other similar wall adhesives (not included). Effortlessly install your sign in any room or space, enhancing décor instantly without complicated setups.

🎁 Perfect Personalised Gift for DIY Dads: Handmade with love, this bespoke street sign plaque is an ideal Father’s Day, birthday, or housewarming gift for handymen and DIY enthusiasts. 🔨 Personalised Daddy's Shed Sign for a Unique Touch: Customise both lines of text, like "DADDY'S SHED" and "IF DADDY CAN'T FIX IT, NO ONE CAN!" (longer text means smaller lettering), to create a bespoke sign for any shed.
description: Product Description Our Street Signs in MDF Wood Dimensions Small (290mm x 63mm/29cm x 6.3cm) Medium (390mm x 85mm/39cm x 8.5cm) Large (440mm x 90mm/44cm x 9cm) Extra Large (590mm x 130mm/59cm x 13cm) The Back View The back is left natural MDF to create a stunning contrast between the printed front and rustic backing Wooden Material Thickness A crucial element of our product – its 3mm thickness. Providing you with a better understanding of what you can expect from our product. Wood - Indoor Use ONLY Our Wooden option can only be used indoors. This is NOT for outdoor use. Great for decorating your hom. Our Street Signs in Acrylic Dimensions Small (290mm x 63mm/29cm x 6.3cm) Medium (390mm x 85mm/39cm x 8.5cm) Large (440mm x 90mm/44cm x 9cm) Extra Large (590mm x 130mm/59cm x 13cm) The Back View The reverse side features a white print, enhancing the overall finish and providing a striking contrast to the print showing through to the front Acrylic Material Thickness A crucial element of our product – its 3mm thickness. Providing you with a better understanding of what you can expect from our product. Acrylic - Indoor & Outdoor Use Our acrylic option is suitable for indoor and outdoor use. Perfect for displaying inside the home or in outdoor spaces We have a fun and thoughtful range for the males in your life Shed fix it theme White sign with blue border, hammer and wrench icons, bold text "IF DADDY CAN'T FIX IT, NO ONE CAN!" on wood with tools below. Shed Fix it theme White sign with brown border, hammer and saw icons, text "IF GRANDAD CAN'T FIX IT - NO ONE CAN!" on wood with a tie, belt, coffee, and tools below. Allotment theme - Green White sign with green border, pumpkin icons, text "LITTLE HELPERS WELCOME - PARENTS BY APPOINTMENT" with gardening tools and veggies below. Allotment theme - Grey White sign with black border, watering can icon, text "LITTLE HELPERS WELCOME - PARENTS BY APPOINTMENT" with gardening tools and bulbs below. Bar theme Personalised white sign with black border, beer mug icons, text "EST. Year" on a table with beer bottles, chips, crackers, pretzels, and onion rings. Beer bottle theme White sign with black border, beer bottle icons, text "GOOD FOOD - GOOD BEER - GOOD TIMES" with grilled skewers, chili, lemon, and parsley below. Beer tanker theme White sign with black border, beer mug icons, text "WHERE BEERS ARE ALWAYS SERVED COLD!" on wood with beer bottles, pretzels, and wheat below. Whisky theme Personalised white sign with black border, whiskey glass icons, text "NO WIFE - NO KIDS - NO PROBLEMS" with whiskey, glass, and shaker below. Office theme Personalised white sign with black border, mug and computer icons, text "TO GAIN ENTRY - BRING TEA!" with office items below. Workshop theme Personalised white sign with brown border, hammer and saw icons, text "IF GRANDAD CAN'T FIX IT - NO ONE CAN!" with tools and items below. DONOT Place In Direct Sunlight Please note, as with any item exposed to direct sunlight,prolonged exposure may cause the print to fade (Wooden) & to become damaged/peel (Acrylic) 4 Sizes Available Small (290mm x 63mm/29cm x 6.3cm) Medium (390mm x 85mm/39cm x 8.5cm) Large (440mm x 90mm/44cm x 9cm) Extra Large (590mm x 130mm/59cm x 13cm) Customise Your Chosen Design With Your Own Text! Choose your design & material Pick from our themed designs and material. MDF Wood - Indoor only Acrylic - Indoor & outdoor use Customise now Click the yellow 'Customise Now' button to personalise your chosen design. Personalise Please enter your personalisation in the text box Double check all spellings and details as we will do exactly as written Preview & purchase You will see this preview on the item for your approval. Double check all details.We will do exactly as the preview Add to basket & checkout as normal Important information please read We recomend products such as command strips for fixing. DO NOT use glues or sprays as they will damage the plaque & print. Keep out of direct sunglight & heat sources as this will damage the print. Do not use any cleaning sprays simply wipe with a dry or damp (not wet) cloth with water to clean.
